mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, category, status, is_pinned, thumbnail_url, view_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at FROM notice ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, title, content, category, status, is_pinned, thumbnail_url, view_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at FROM notice WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notice (title, content, category, status, is_pinned, thumbnail_url, admin_id, published_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{status}, #{pinned}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{adminId},
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, is_pinned = #{pinned}, thumbnail_url= #{thumbnailUrl}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , published_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
